DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Narayan Bhandari, Esq. 925-822-3440 Dharma Law PC for Plaintiff.
Chandrani Mandal, ESq 650-871-9544 Cholakiam & Associates for Defendant Bruce Ficus (observing only)
Stephen Ellingson, Esq. 650-637-9100 Ellingson & Guslani for DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
Court Reporter: Cambria Denlinger, CSR14009, 408-244-1900, cambria.denlinger@gmail.com

ARGUED. Mr. Bhandari contests the court's tentative ruling and presents arguments; request leave to amend, answer on file making motion moot, there is a duty per the insurance code. Mr. Ellingson responds - no statutory right to sue 3rd party claim. After arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's demurrer to Amended Complaint is
Taken Under Submission. ***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Cambria Denlinger, CSR14009, 408-244-1900, cambria.denlinger@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)
